title: 02 meg tensions one component rail
prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul, Meg, and wardrobe. Image 2 locks daylight top bleachers. Image 3 locks dense mango-flesh armor and graphite joints. Image 4 locks mango helpers. INVARIANTS — Raul's real face is uncovered; normal clothes remain visible on unarmored areas. SUBSTRATE — One pre-shaped dense mango-flesh shoulder plate, separate from Raul. INITIAL STATE — The plate rests on the bleacher seat three feet to Raul's right. APPLIED FORCE — Meg leans back with both feet planted and pulls one long amber edible strip taut; its far end passes through a visible loop on the plate. Four mango helpers push the plate from behind. TOPOLOGY — The strip, plate loop, helpers, and open graphite shoulder socket form one uninterrupted straight line. No other strings or floating components. STATE CHANGE — The plate slides along the aluminum row toward the empty shoulder socket; half the distance remains, making assembly incomplete and obvious. SHOT PROOF — Low open daylight wide along the row, Meg at right under tension, Raul at left, moving plate centered between them, every contact point visible. LITERALIZATION HAZARDS / VETO — no flower, wings, lighthouse, beam, fishing rod, grape-character chain, giant fruit behind Raul, finished suit, floating plate, bodybuilder anatomy.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, not a collage or design sheet. Obey the countable mechanical specification before making the frame pretty. Keep one causal action readable through physical contact, tension, attached edges, and a visible active boundary. Preserve declared reference authorities. No captions, labels, watermarks, invented packaging, gore, weapons, generic gummy bears, generic magical glow, or unexplained finished transformations.
